title: Cyclophorus beddomeanus
taxonomy: Cyclophorus beddomeanus is a species of air-breathing land snail, specifically belonging to the family Cyclophoridae. Within the kingdom Animalia, it is classified under the phylum Mollusca and class Gastropoda. The order Pulmonata is also included in the classification of this species, along with the infraclass Pulmonata, which further divides into the suborder Basommatophora. This division places Cyclophorus beddomeanus within the family Cyclophoridae, which contains numerous species of snails found in the region of Sri Lanka. Its classification helps in understanding the evolutionary history and relationships of this snail species with others within its family.
